seo.title: Brunch in Mission Beach San Diego | Miss B's Coconut Club
seo.description: Brunch at Miss B's Coconut Club in Mission Beach, San Diego. Served daily until 2pm. Mimosas from the flamingo tap wall, tropical cocktails, and the best brunch plates on Mission Blvd.

hero.imageAlt: Miss B's Coconut Club brunch Mission Beach San Diego
hero.heading:
Brunch
in Mission Beach
hero.subheading: Miss B's Coconut Club serves brunch every day of the week. Doors open at 9am Saturday and Sunday, 10am Monday through Friday, and brunch service runs until 2pm.

experience.imageAlt: Miss B's Coconut Club brunch interior Mission Beach San Diego
experience.heading:
Mission Beach's
Best Weekend Ritual
body: Miss B's Coconut Club does not do brunch halfway. The full kitchen is open, the bar is pouring, and the outdoor patio is yours. Steps from the Pacific at 3704 Mission Blvd.
Mimosas from the flamingo tap wall, tropical morning cocktails, and a menu built for a long, indulgent afternoon. Walk-ins welcome. Reservations recommended.

cocktails.heading:
Mimosas & Morning
Cocktails on Tap
cocktails.body: Mimosas poured in front of 24 copper flamingo taps. Tropical morning cocktails, Bloody Marys, and the full Miss B's bar program available daily during brunch hours.
